scripts.accessibility: echo 'To run accessibility tests, visit http://localhost:5173/ and use browser dev tools or axe DevTools extension'
scripts.docs: echo '📖 Documentation files:' && echo '  - IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md: Complete development process and setup guide' && echo '  - PROJECT_RULES.md: Project guidelines and standards' && echo '  - CHANGELOG.md: Change history' && echo '  - README.md: Project overview'
scripts.setup-email: echo '📧 To set up EmailJS for the contact form:' && echo '1. Create account at https://www.emailjs.com/' && echo '2. Create an email service (Gmail, Outlook, etc.)' && echo '3. Create an email template' && echo '4. Copy .env.example to .env and fill in your credentials' && echo '5. Restart the development server'
